model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: ByteDance/Hyper-SD (Hyper-SDXL-8steps-CFG-lora.safetensors, CFG-preserved variant). lora_scale=0.125 per model card. Ideal scheduler: DDIMScheduler with timestep_spacing='trailing'. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 0.125 per model card recommendation. Do NOT increase significantly — this LoRA is a subtle accelerator, not a style LoRA.

generation._hint: 8 steps recommended (CFG-preserved variant). Range: 4–16. More steps do not significantly improve quality for this distilled variant. | CFG 5–8 is the valid range for the CFG-preserved variant. Values below 5 or above 8 reduce quality. | SDXL native 1024×1024.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates high-quality images in only 8 steps using Hyper-SD — a CFG-preserved acceleration LoRA from ByteDance. Significantly faster than standard SDXL without quality loss.
notes.prompt_guide: No trigger word. Write standard SDXL-style descriptive prompts. Examples: 'a photorealistic portrait of a woman, studio lighting', 'a fantasy landscape with mountains and a dragon, epic lighting', 'a still life of fruits on a wooden table, oil painting'.
